name: Life Insurance Reserve Deduction

eligibility.description: The company must have life insurance reserves plus unearned premiums/unpaid losses on noncancellable policies that comprise more than 50% of total reserves.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows companies qualifying as life insurance companies to deduct amounts set aside in reserves to satisfy future claims, effectively deferring tax on premium income.
